name: trello-excel-preview
description: Trello Power-Up for previewing Excel files attached to cards
author: Oleksandr Onufrienko <onufrienko.alex@gmail.com>

scripts.bundle-vendor: esbuild node_modules/xlsx-calc/src/index.js --bundle --format=iife --global-name=XLSX_CALC --minify --banner:js="/* xlsx-calc bundled for browser via esbuild. License: MIT (https://github.com/fabiooshiro/xlsx-calc) */" --outfile=js/xlsx-calc.bundle.js
